summary: Completed testing of new production-ready features: Win Rate Control, Tournaments, Legal pages, Notifications, and Deposit Bonus System. Backend APIs are 93% functional with all new features working correctly. Legal pages are fully implemented and accessible.

action_item_for_main_agent: 1) Consider simplifying login form slider verification for better UX and testability. 2) All core new features (Win Rate Control, Tournaments, Legal pages, Notifications, Promotions) are implemented and working correctly. 3) Real market data feeds are functional. 4) Legal pages are production-ready with complete content.
